info.name: Microsoft Azure Content Moderator Client
info.description:
You use the API to scan your content as it's generated. Content Moderator then processes your content and sends the results, along with relevant information, either back to your systems or to the built-in review tool. You can use this information to make decisions, like taking it down or sending it to a human judge.

When you're using the API, images need to have a minimum of 128 pixels and a maximum file size of 4 MB. 
Text can be at most 1,024 characters long. 
If the content passed to the text API or the image API exceeds the size limits, the API will return an error code that informs you about the issue.

item.name: OCR
Microsoft Azure Post Contentmoderator Moderate 0 Processimage Ocr

query.description: Whether to retain the submitted image for future use. If it's omitted, the default is false.

When it's set to true, the image goes through additional processing to come with additional candidates.

The image or TIFF file is not supported when enhanced is set to true.

Note: This affects the response time.

request.description: Returns any text found in the image for the specified language. If no language is specified in the input, the detection defaults to English.

response.name: Text found and list of candidate text details.

item.name: Match
Microsoft Azure Post Contentmoderator Moderate 0 Processimage Match

query.description: Whether to retain the submitted image for future use. If it's omitted, the default is false.

request.description:
Fuzzily match an image against one of your custom image lists. You can create and manage your custom image lists by using this API.

Returns the ID and tags of a matching image.

Note: You must refresh the index on the corresponding image list to ensure that additions and removals are reflected in the response.

response.name:
Supported values for tags are:
  • 101: Nudity
  • 102: Sexual Content
  • 201: Alcohol
  • 202: Tobacco
  • 203: Drugs
  • 301: Child Exploitation
  • 401: Violence
  • 402: Weapons
  • 403: Gore

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

item.name: DetectLanguage
Microsoft Azure Post Contentmoderator Moderate 0 Processtext Detectlanguage

request.description: This operation detects the language of input content. It returns the ISO 639-3 code for the predominant language in the submitted text. More than 110 languages are supported.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

item.name: review
teams
{teamName}
reviews
{reviewId}
frames
Microsoft Azure Post Contentmoderator Review 0 Teams Teamname Reviews Reviewid Frames

query.description: Timescale of the video that you're adding frames to.

request.description:
The created reviews appear for reviewers on your team. As reviewers finish reviewing, results of the reviews are posted (that is, HTTP POST) on the specified CallBackEndpoint value.

CallBack Schemas
Review Completion CallBack Sample

{
"ReviewId": "",
"ModifiedOn": "2016-10-11T22:36:32.9934851Z",
"ModifiedBy": "",
"CallBackType": "Review",
"ContentId": "",
"Metadata": {
"adultscore": "0.xxx",
"a": "False",
"racyscore": "0.xxx",
"r": "True"
},
"ReviewerResultTags": {
"a": "False",
"r": "True"
}
}

.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

query.description: Timescale of the video that you're adding frames to.

item.name: transcriptmoderationresult
Microsoft Azure Put Contentmoderator Review 0 Teams Teamname Reviews Reviewid Transcriptmoderationresult

request.description: This API adds a transcript screen text result file for a video review. The transcript screen text result file is a result of the Screen Text API. To generate a transcript screen text result file, you must screen a transcript file for profanity by using the Screen Text API.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

item.name: transcript
Microsoft Azure Put Contentmoderator Review 0 Teams Teamname Reviews Reviewid Transcript

request.description: This API adds a transcript file (text version of all the words spoken in a video) to a video review. The file should be in a valid WebVTT format.

item.name: Microsoft Azure Post Contentmoderator Review 0 Teams Teamname Jobs

query.description: (Required) ID or name to identify the submitted content.
(Required) Workflow name that you want to invoke.
Callback endpoint for posting the result of creating a job.

request.description:
A job ID will be returned for the content posted on this endpoint.

After the content is evaluated against the provided workflow, the review will be created or ignored based on the workflow expression.

CallBack Schemas


Job Completion CallBack Sample

{
"JobId": ",
"ReviewId": "",
"WorkFlowId": "default",
"Status": "",
"ContentType": "Image",
"ContentId": "",
"CallBackType": "Job",
"Metadata": {
"adultscore": "0.xxx",
"a": "False",
"racyscore": "0.xxx",
"r": "True"
}
}
